title: IT: Welcome to Derry
overview: In 1962, amid a spate of unexplained disappearances of local children, a group of misfit friends begin to suspect a long-buried ancient evil lurking. As the kids set out to determine what's really going on, a rising unease prompts several townspeople to work together to restore peace – all while a U.S. military operation seeks to exploit Derry for its own objectives.
reason: Highly anticipated HBO prequel to a popular horror franchise, boasting an 8.0 IMDb rating from a massive 95K+ votes and helmed by the Muschietti siblings.

title: Pluribus
overview: The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.
reason: Critically acclaimed with an 87 Metacritic score and an 8.0 IMDb rating from over 127K votes, driven by renowned creator Vince Gilligan and a strong lead actor on Apple TV.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.
reason: Part of the immensely popular Marvel Cinematic Universe on Disney+, this show features Emmy-winning actor Yahya Abdul-Mateen II and holds a good 7.6 IMDb rating from over 12K votes.

title: All Her Fault
overview: In Chicago, Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue, expecting to pick up her young son Milo from his first playdate with a boy at his new school. But the woman who answers the door isn't a mother she recognizes. She isn't the nanny. She doesn't have Milo. And so begins every parent's worst nightmare.
reason: Features Emmy-winning actor Sarah Snook and has a strong 7.5 IMDb rating with over 21K votes, indicating solid audience anticipation.

title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: A Netflix original featuring a strong ensemble cast including Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal, with a solid 7.2 IMDb rating from over 65K votes.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: A Netflix drama featuring Emmy-winning actors Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys, achieving a good 7.5 IMDb rating with over 21K votes.
